title: Simplest Hammers
description: Tiered hammers capable of mining in a 3x3 area
body:
# About

**Tired of endless digging in Minecraft? Use a hammer!**

This mod adds hammers that function like pickaxes but in a 3x3 area which greatly simplifies resource gathering and digging in the middle and late stages of the game.

# How It Works 

To obtain a hammer, you must first find a new smithing template to upgrade your pickaxe. It can be found in villages: most often in the weaponsmiths, toolsmiths, and armorers houses, less often in regular houses. 

Using a smithing template and a block of appropriate material on a smithing table, you can upgrade your pickaxe to a brand new hammer.

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f606c67e77050057387278f44215b85a23c6ce6f.png)

# FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Hammers to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Hammers to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
